jobs.title: Analyst II, Credit Risk Analytics
jobs.content:
About Affirm:

Affirm is reinventing credit to make it more honest and friendly, giving consumers the flexibility to buy now and pay later without any hidden fees or compounding interest. Own credit-risk analytics across the BNPL underwriting decisioning surface and the Affirm Card debit-card portfolio.

  • SQL / Python / loss-modelling experience required

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Merchant Checkout Platform
jobs.content: Own the merchant-checkout integrations platform that anchors Affirm's BNPL category — the JavaScript SDK, the Shopify / BigCommerce / WooCommerce adapters, and the headless-checkout API surface that thousands of merchants integrate against.
